question: Does the verifier-gated ingestion loop admit true live facts and reject false/unknowable ones better than naive retrieval (raw RAG) and than no filter (accept-all), on a labeled held-out pack, without fabricating (admitting false claims)?

theoryClaims.C1: verifier-as-truth-filter — admission precision/recall/fabricationRate (THIS spec, Phase-0 offline floor)
theoryClaims.C2: grounding uplift — live passAt1 vs baselines on time-sensitive QA (Phase-1, online, requires a model)
theoryClaims.C3: no self-harm — contamination rate ~0, calibration, forgetting, reward-hack-rate==0 (Phase-1/3)

primaryMetric: admission precision of the full gate, and delta admission-accuracy (full minus raw_rag), paired per item
secondaryMetrics: admission recall / F1 of the full gate
fabricationRate per arm (admitted but label != true)
ECE / Brier from the verdict-level construct (fact_check_eval)
arms: raw_rag (admit on any retrieved evidence, no verifier) — the key baseline; falsifier is full ~= raw_rag
primaryN: Phase-0 committed run: eval/fact_check/heldout_v1.jsonl (N=53; true=22/false=19/unknowable=12). This N is a FLOOR/WIRING check: MDE@53 ~= 0.27, so any arm delta below that is reported 'underpowered', never as a direction. A GO/NO-GO needs the Phase-1 powered N below.
requiredNForMDE: computed at run time via eval_stats.required_n_for_mde(0.10) (~=785 paired items at rho=0); grow the labeled pack to this before any GO

groundTruth.rule: each claim carries an external label in {true,false,unknowable}; true should be admitted, false/unknowable should not. Phase-1 promotion additionally requires >=2 INDEPENDENT LLM-judge families (judge != the verifier), reporting kappa>=0.40 or Gwet AC1 with CI.
groundTruth.use: GO/NO-GO — the deterministic Phase-0 construct alone does NOT satisfy the >=2-family rule

controlSanity.rule: the verifier must admit >50% of known-true AND reject >50% of known-false; otherwise the backend/harness is artifacting (the 0/N-on-both-sides trap) and the arms are void

baselineContrast.rule: raw_rag and accept_all are scored on the IDENTICAL pack/grader; the falsifier is that raw_rag matches or beats full

coupledVerifierAudit.rule: the verifier that supplies the ingestion gate must NOT also be the sole labeler; Phase-1 uses a sealed, independently-adjudicated audit set the verifier is never tuned on

temporalDecontam.rule: for the Phase-1 live pack, reject any source whose publish date postdates the frozen eval cutoff (streaming_decontam.temporal_decontam); measure and report the leakage rate

decontam.rule: Phase-1 live-ingested items are disjoint from the held-out/eval surface (exact + shingle + paraphrase); do NOT synthesize/paraphrase to inflate N (that is contamination)

noOverclaim.rule: report precision/recall/fabricationRate honestly; a powered CI-excludes-0 uplift is still NO-GO if it trips an integrity gate; canClaimAGI stays false
